problems_encountered.description: MCP tools not available in current agent execution context. Running in eval/results directory without access to mittwald MCP server's tool calling interface. The tool handler code exists at /Users/robert/Code/mittwald-mcp/src/handlers/tools/mittwald-cli/org/membership-revoke-cli.ts and would call revokeOrgMembership() from @mittwald-mcp/cli-core library.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed. Expected behavior: Would call DELETE /v2/memberships/{membershipId} API endpoint via revokeOrgMembership() library function, removing a member from an organization. Requires confirm=true parameter as safety check for this destructive operation.
execution_notes: Tool handler requires membershipId parameter and MUST have confirm=true to proceed (destructive operation guard). Logs warning before execution with membershipId, organizationId, sessionId, and userId for audit trail. Validates session token, calls library function, returns revoked: true on success. Would require a membershipId from org-membership-list. This is a destructive write operation that removes organization access. Cannot execute without MCP tool access.
